dict.string: MoodSync reads your heart rate, sleep, and activity data to automate your smart home based on how you're feeling.
MoodSync activates HomeKit scenes you've configured (like "Relax" or "Focus") based on your biometrics.
MoodSync uses your location to detect when you arrive at or leave the home region you set, so it can trigger arrival/departure automations.
MoodSync monitors your home region in the background so arrival/departure automations still fire when the app isn't open.
